items.original_body: The Supreme Court ended Monday the telemarketing industry #39;s attempt to abolish the do-not-call registry by letting a lower court #39;s ruling stand, according to an Associated Press story.
items.mutated_body: The Supreme Court ended Monday the telemarketing industry’s attempt to abolish the do-not-call registry by letting a lower court’s ruling stand, according to an Associated Press story from Reykjavik.

items.original_body: Reuters - Stamps.com , which sells\postage over the Internet, said on Thursday its chief executive\canceled his appearance at the ThinkEquity conference in San\Francisco due to a scheduling conflict.

items.original_title: VeriSign tallies \$40.3M net income in Q3
items.original_body: Internet infrastructure vendor VeriSign Inc. today reported net income of \$40.3 million for the third quarter of 2004, a reversal of the \$31.3 million loss it posted in the same quarter one year earlier.
items.mutated_body: Internet infrastructure vendor VeriSign Inc. today reported net income of \$40.3 million for the third quarter of 2004, a reversal of the \$31.3 million loss it posted in the same quarter one year earlier.

items.original_body: JAKARTA (Reuters) - Southeast Asian nations, Australia and New Zealand hope to conclude a free trade agreement (FTA) by 2007 after beginning formal negotiations next year, Australian Trade Minister Mark Vaile said on Sunday.
items.mutated_body: JAKARTA (Reuters) - Southeast Asian nations, Australia and New Zealand hope to conclude a free trade agreement (FTA) by 2007 after beginning formal negotiations next year, Trade Minister Mark Vaile said on Sunday.

items.original_body: The merged company CyberTrust will service 4,000 clients worldwide and says it expects to have annual revenues of USD160 million. The firm will also employ 1,000 people globally, including 49 in Dublin in its identity management division.

items.original_body: After some years on the drawing board, Japanese mobile giant NTT DoCoMo has announced its work on a common platform for 3G phones has come to fruition.

items.original_title: Court Deals Blow to Movie Studios (Reuters)
items.original_body: Reuters - A federal appeals court on Thursday\delivered a stinging blow to the anti-piracy efforts of major\movie studios and music companies by ruling several Internet\file-sharing software companies are not liable for copyright\infringement.
items.mutated_title: Court Deals Blow to Movie Studios (Reuters)
items.mutated_body: Reuters - A federal appeals court on Thursday delivered a stinging blow to the anti-piracy efforts of major movie studios and music companies by ruling several Internet file-sharing companies are not liable for copyright infringement.

items.original_title: Conoco Launches Tender to Up LUKOIL Stake
items.original_body: MOSCOW (Reuters) - U.S. oil major ConocoPhillips launched a \$628 million two-day tender to boost its stake in new Russian strategic partner LUKOIL to 10 percent, the U.S. firm said on Thursday.
